artifact_type_inferred: City of Tampa DMI 10 Subcontractor Solicitation Form
artifact_summary: Official City of Tampa document for tracking solicited subcontractors, consultants, and suppliers, including contact details, NIGP codes, and solicitation status.
artifact_blurb: This is a City of Tampa DMI 10 form designed to formally document and track all solicited subcontractors, consultants, or suppliers associated with a specific municipal contract. The document features dedicated sections for company contact information, NIGP classification codes, and a structured table to record solicitation methods alongside response status indicators.

The document features dedicated sections for company contact information, NIGP classification codes, and a structured table to record solicitation methods alongside response status indicators.
